description: Apache Commons Lang provides helper classes that extend core java.lang functionality, including utilities for strings, numbers, reflection, builders, ranges, tuples, and concurrency. It supplies reusable null-safe operations and small abstractions for common Java programming tasks that would otherwise require repeated boilerplate.

Apache Commons Lang provides reusable Java utility classes that extend core `java.lang` functionality with helpers for strings, numbers, objects, reflection, concurrency, and more. It helps Java applications avoid reimplementing common low-level programming tasks by packaging widely used language-level utilities.
